title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo – get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node and browsers to talk to the Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama for chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (formerly Ollama-WebUI) that feels like ChatGPT but runs entirely local.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder APIs, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for chatting, pulling, and managing Ollama models from Rails or plain Ruby.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with syntax highlighting, history, and shell completions for Ollama.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Coppt-like pair-programmer inside VS Code.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models for generative question-answering pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for running Ollama on Raspberry Pi, GPU clusters, Kubernetes, and edge devices.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready Docker Compose stacks with GPU support, persistent volumes, and WebUI.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and model pre-load hooks.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG starter that combines Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host a Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings local LLMs into your workspace threads and DMs.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package providing JS/TS bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official Python package on PyPI for chatting, embedding, and managing Ollama models.
